evals.prompt: Refactor the following React component (src/components/Hero.tsx) to improve its structure, readability, and maintainability. Break it down into smaller sub-components if it makes sense, and use tailwind-merge and clsx for cleaner class management.
evals.expected_output: The component should be broken down into logical sub-components (e.g., HeroBadge, HeroStats, HeroActions). It should use clsx and twMerge for class management. The overall structure should be more readable and maintainable while keeping the same visual behavior.
